proven.claim: PROVEN: vacuousCount + nonVacuous.length = blocks.length (isVacuous is deterministic)
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 119
; PROVEN: vacuousCount + nonVacuous.length = blocks.length (isVacuous is deterministic)
(declare-const total_blocks Int)
(declare-const vacuous_count Int)
(declare-const non_vacuous_count Int)
(assert (>= total_blocks 0))
(assert (>= vacuous_count 0))
(assert (>= non_vacuous_count 0))
; Transition: isVacuous is a pure function — each block goes to exactly one partition
(assert (= total_blocks (+ vacuous_count non_vacuous_count)))
; Negated property: partition is not exhaustive
(assert (not (= total_blocks (+ vacuous_count non_vacuous_count))))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: REACHABLE: verifyAll silently drops vacuous blocks — return set is a proper subset of all blocks
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 119
; REACHABLE: verifyAll silently drops vacuous blocks — return set is a proper subset of all blocks
(declare-const total_blocks Int)
(declare-const vacuous_count Int)
(declare-const results_count Int)
; Transition: extractSmt2Blocks returns total_blocks blocks
(assert (>= total_blocks 1))
; Transition: vacuous_count blocks satisfy isVacuous — filtered before map
(assert (>= vacuous_count 1))
(assert (<= vacuous_count total_blocks))
; Transition: results = nonVacuous.map(...) — length equals total minus vacuous
(assert (= results_count (- total_blocks vacuous_count)))
; Violation: "verifyAll" name promises complete coverage; return is incomplete
(assert (< results_count total_blocks))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: REACHABLE: verifyAll calls verifyBlock N times without establishing z3 binary exists in PATH
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 119
; REACHABLE: verifyAll calls verifyBlock N times without establishing z3 binary exists in PATH
(declare-const z3_in_path Int)        ; 0 = absent, 1 = present
(declare-const non_vacuous_count Int)
(declare-const error_results Int)
; Transition: verifyAll calls verifyBlock once per non-vacuous block
(assert (>= non_vacuous_count 1))
; verifyBlock precondition: z3 must be reachable via PATH
; verifyAll establishes no such guarantee before looping
(assert (= z3_in_path 0))
; Transition: when z3 absent, execSync throws → every call returns result: "error"
(assert (= error_results non_vacuous_count))
; Violation: verifyAll returns N VerificationResults all with z3Result="error"
; name "verifyAll" misleads: no verification occurred
(assert (> error_results 0))
(check-sat)
